Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify Welcome widget is displayed and in expanded state by default on the Home page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify the Welcome widget is present on the Home page and is in expanded state by default on page load.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page at /home/index.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Welcome' heading is visible in the main content area
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Welcome' heading is displayed in the Home page main content area.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the Welcome accordion toggle is in expanded state
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: The Welcome accordion is expanded and welcome message content is visible below the heading.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Security: Verify 'Edit' link on Welcome widget is visible to System Admin and navigates to Welcome Edit page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page. Welcome widget is visible.
Objective: To verify the 'Edit' link in the Welcome widget is visible to System Admin and navigates to /home/welcome_edit.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page at /home/index.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Edit' link is visible in the Welcome widget header area
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Edit' link is visible in the Welcome widget section confirming System Admin has edit access.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Edit' link in the Welcome widget
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the Welcome Edit page at /home/welcome_edit.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Home' link in the left sidebar to return
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated back to the Home page at /home/index.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.
